nodes.name: hetero_gnn_encoder.py
nodes.summary: Defines heterogeneous GNN encoder building blocks for FraudGT, including reusable wrapped layers and the main HeteroGNNEncoder that applies PyG heterogeneous convolutions over node and edge-type dictionaries.

nodes.name: GeneralLayer
nodes.summary: Wraps a neural layer with optional normalization, dropout, activation, and L2 normalization behavior.

nodes.name: GeneralMultiLayer
nodes.summary: Stacks multiple GeneralLayer blocks to build a configurable multilayer projection module.

nodes.name: HeteroGNNEncoder
nodes.summary: Encodes graph batches with configurable GNN layers for HeteroGNN representations.

nodes.name: hetero_label_encoder.py
nodes.summary: Provides heterogeneous label encoders that inject masked node or edge labels into batch features for semi-supervised graph learning.

nodes.name: HeteroLabelNodeEncoder
nodes.summary: Converts node or edge labels into masked one-hot feature embeddings for label-aware training.

nodes.name: HeteroLabelEdgeEncoder
nodes.summary: Converts node or edge labels into masked one-hot feature embeddings for label-aware training.

nodes.name: hetero_pos_encoder.py
nodes.summary: Implements heterogeneous positional-embedding encoders, including a configurable HeteroPENodeEncoder and thin registered variants for RWSE, metapath, node2vec, TransE, ComplEx, and DistMult embeddings.

nodes.name: HeteroPENodeEncoder
nodes.summary: Encodes node features or positional embeddings into the hidden feature space expected by GraphGym models.

nodes.name: finetuning.py
nodes.summary: Loads pretrained GraphGym/FraudGT configurations and checkpoints, compares compatible settings, and initializes selected model weights for finetuning.

nodes.summary: Resolves the checkpoint file to use for pretrained model initialization.

nodes.summary: Compares current and pretrained configurations to detect incompatible finetuning settings.

nodes.summary: Recursively permits new configuration keys while loading pretrained settings.

nodes.name: load_pretrained_model_cfg
nodes.summary: Loads and adapts the configuration associated with a pretrained checkpoint directory.

nodes.name: init_model_from_pretrained
nodes.summary: Transfers compatible pretrained weights into the current model before finetuning.

nodes.name: checkpoint.py
nodes.summary: Implements checkpoint persistence helpers for GraphGym training runs, including save, load, cleanup, and checkpoint path discovery functions.

nodes.name: load_ckpt
nodes.summary: Loads model, optimizer, scheduler, and epoch state from a saved checkpoint.

nodes.name: save_ckpt
nodes.summary: Persists model and optimizer state for a training epoch.

nodes.name: remove_ckpt
nodes.summary: Deletes a specific checkpoint file for cleanup.

nodes.name: clean_ckpt
nodes.summary: Removes intermediate checkpoints while preserving selected training states.

nodes.summary: Builds or discovers checkpoint paths and epoch identifiers for GraphGym runs.
